target: 3. Mysterious Feeling

(When I met the tide on the beach,
and just now during dinner…)
(Am I the only one feeling weird?)
(No, it's not just me—)
Shin-chan!
Whoa!?

S-sorry!
I didn't think you'd be so startled.

Ah, it's fine.
I was just looking something up on my phone,
so I got startled more than usual.
What were you looking up?
Well, all sorts of things.
Anyway, did you need something?

I guess you could call it…
I came to tell you the bath is free now.
Next, Shin-chan's turn.
Ah, thanks.

You must be tired from your long trip.
Take your time soaking.
Let me know if you need anything.

Understood.
I'll do that.
(…Why is that?)

(This should be the first time I've come here in two years.
But for some reason…)
It feels like I came here recently…
Whoa!?
U-uh, Ushio!?

What are you staring at!?
You almost ran into me!
You were spacing out too, so you almost ran into me.

Ugh!
I'm allowed to be deep in thought too!

(Steam from the bath… and…
the scent of shampoo…)
…W-what are you looking at!?

Ah… no…
You were in the bath.

That's right!
Got something to say?
No… not really…
W-why are you fidgeting!?
I-I'm not!
…I'll say this first!

That thing on the beach was different!
I didn't hug you or anything!
(Probably she hugged me!)

(…I wanted to say that,
but if I anger her again, it'll just be a loop)

(I was just starting to feel better after the curry.
Let's change the subject)

Ah, um…
Has Alain come back yet?
Ah, he doesn't seem to have yet.

Since it's such a hassle,
I wanted Alain to try the curry too.
I even saved some for him.

Honestly, I was worried you'd eat it all,
but…
I don't have that kind of appetite!

But Dad,
he's been busy with the festival preparations
and hasn't eaten yet…
…Ushio?
The festival preparations…

Hey, maybe the
"festive atmosphere" is affecting us?
What are you trying to say!?

During dinner.
When you heard the word "festival,"
didn't you get a chill?
Y-yeah! But why do you know!?

I felt the same.
Look, I just said it myself,
and now I'm in this mess.

Seriously…
My skin's crawling.
But… what's going on?

Why does it feel so creepy?
It should be fun, right?

That's right, Shinpei.
Honestly, what's weird is
the curry you made too.
Huh? My curry too?

No, that's not it!
It wasn't bad or anything!
It was super delicious!

It's just… I should've had it two years ago,
but it didn't feel like it at all…
Seriously?

It felt like I just ate it,
so it's annoying.

Actually… I feel the same.
Hitogashima Island and this house,
I feel like I came here recently.
You came back two years ago, right?

Hey, Ushio.
You said earlier at the beach---

Are you still going to say that!?
That was---
Listen to the whole thing!

You said you had a weird dream
when you were at the beach today.

Maybe it's the same kind of dream…
I think I had one too.

Eh…?
Both of us having the same dream…
That's impossible, right?
Ah, yeah, it's not normal.

But I was curious,
so I looked up if there's any phenomenon like this.
What did you find?

No luck.
It's all fragmented information,
I couldn't make sense of it.
Today's been full of weird stuff.

This is the place where Shinpei's
"thinking" usually works, right?

No, even if I "think" now,
it won't lead to any conclusion.

Heh, I guess that's how it is.
I just wanted to try.
Ugh…
What are you two laughing about?
Mio…!?
…Huh.
W-what's going on!?

You two made up already?
That was quick.

Huh?
Ah, yeah…

What!?
We haven't made up yet!
Eh…!?
Don't get ahead of yourself, Shinpei!
Hey, older sister?

I'm going to sleep!
Don't knock on my door at night!
…She's gone.
Maybe I said something unnecessary?

No, don't worry about it.
It's normal here.

Ah, yeah.
It feels nostalgic.

Shin-chan and older sister…
You two used to fight a lot, didn't you?

Well, it's been two years,
so it's like we've been fighting all along.

But I haven't seen you two argue face to face
in a while.

Actually, seeing the two of you argue
made me feel nostalgic.
Even if you feel nostalgic about that…
But think about it…

It means both of you are still the same as before.
You need to grow up a bit more, right?
…Yes.
If you're done with the bath, let me know.
Ah, yeah, I got it.
The festival…
